response.step_by_step_log: 1. Reviewed video content: Slideshow of fan messages, concert details, and merchandise. 2. Listened to audio: Confirmed no vocals present in the background music. 3. Defined scene boundaries based on visual content changes (fan messages, concert info, merch). 4. Constructed final JSON with all required fields, setting vocal music flags to false.
response.global_summary: The video is a promotional slideshow for the 'Drawn to Dawn' 1st concert of Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis. It features a collage of fan messages, concert announcements, attendee guidelines, and merchandise information. The background audio is entirely instrumental.

scenes.description: A slideshow of fan messages and well-wishes for the upcoming concert.
An announcement slide stating the concert will be starting soon.
An 'Attention for Visitors' slide with safety and cheering guidelines.
A series of slides detailing the concert merchandise and sales information.
Closing sequence repeating the 'Concert starting soon' and 'Attention' slides.
